mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.room_no AS roomNo, r.room_type AS roomType, r.floor, r.capacity, r.status, r.remark, r.create_time AS createTime FROM room r INNER JOIN ( SELECT r2.id FROM room r2 ORDER BY r2.floor ASC, r2.room_no ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize} ) page_ids ON r.id = page_ids.id ORDER BY r.floor ASC, r.room_no ASC
